calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Sep-02-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Elder Abuse/Dependent Adult TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204, Judge Pro Temp: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722, Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

Judy Lee Hitchcook, Esq. for Petitioner: Richard Geiger, also present.

No appearance by the Respondent: Jose Machado.

The Petitioner was sworn.

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Petitioner's order is Granted as follows: Respondent shall stay at least 25 yards away from the protected person: Richard Geiger and his Residence/Vehicle. Additional orders were granted as requested (see order).

Respondent shall not Harass, Attack, Strike, Threaten, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Follow, Stalk, Destroy Personal Property, Keep under Surveillance, or Block Movements, Contact (directly or indirectly), Telephone, Send Messages, Mail or e-Mail, Take Any Action, Directly or Through Others, to Obtain the Addresses or Locations of the Protected Persons.

Expires: September 2, 2012.

The order was signed in open court.
